title: Cauldrons+
description: This mod adds mini potions that you get from cauldrons!
body:
This mod adds mini potions that you can get from cauldrons. Right-click an empty cauldron, insert a coal block for fuel (it will not go away; you still do need it for cauldron brewing), a water bucket, at least 2 glass bottles in the bottle slot, a potion ingredient in that slot, press "Mix", and 2 mini potions will appear in the mini potion slot. When you drink the mini potion, the effect will last for 10 seconds (except for instant health and instant harming, that's instant). This mod also adds a potion book with a list of all the potion ingredients (crafted with a normal book and a cauldron) in 1.6.0.

List of mini potions:

- Speed
- Fire Resistance
- Slow falling
- Poison
- Night Vision
- Regeneration
- Instant Health
- Strength
- Mini Potion Of Life
- Harming
- Invisibility
- Water breathing
- Turtle master
- Saturation
- Weakness
- Levivation
- Haste
- Dolphin's Grace
- Resistance

### 1.0.0:

**Potion ingredients:**

- Sugar for speed
- Magma cream for fire resistance
- Feather for slow falling
- Spider eye for poison
- Golden carrot for night vision
- Ghast tear for regeneration
- Glistering melon slice for instant health
- Blaze powder for strength

### 1.1.0:

Mini Potion Of Life: If you craft this potion with a brown mushroom, it will turn into an edible mushroom. If you craft this potion with a poisonous potato, it will turn into a regular potato. If you craft the potion with crying obsidian, it will trun into regular obsidian. Beware that the bottle is lost in the process.

Mini Potion Of Harming: It ddamages you.

Mini Potion Of Invisibility: It gives you invisibility for 10 seconds.

**Potion ingredients:**

- Any sapling for life
- Wither skull for harming
- Night vision potion in bottle slot, nothing in water bucket slot, fermented spider eye in ingredients slot for invisibility

### 1.2.0:

Mini Potion Of Water Breathing: Gives you water breathing for 10 seconds.

Mini Potion Of The Turtle Master: Gives you slowness 4 and resistance 3 for 10 seconds.

**Potion Ingredients:**

- Pufferfish for water breathing
- Turtle scute for turtle master

### 1.3.0:

Mini Potion Of Saturation: Gives you enough saturation to fill up 4 hunger bars.

**Potion ingredients:**

- Steak, cooked porkchop, cooked mutton, or cooked chicken for saturation.

### 1.4.0:

Mini Potion Of Weakness: Gives you weakness for 10 seconds.

Mini Potion Of Levivation: Gives you levivation for 10 seconds.

Mini Potion Of Haste: Gives you haste for 10 seconds.

Mini Potion Of Dolphins Grace: Gives you dolphins grace for 10 seconds.

**Potion Ingredients:**

- Fermented spider eye for weakness
- Phantom membrane for levitation
- Diamond pickaxe for haste
- Tropical fish for dolphins grace

### 1.5.0:

Mini Potion Of Resistance: Gives you resistance for 10 seconds.

**Potion Ingredients:**

- Shield for resistance

### 1.6.0:

Adds a potion book with all the potion ingredients crafted with a regular book and a cauldron. Right-click to see all the ingredients.

**1.6.1:**

This fixes the bug where night vision potions can stack up to 64.
